evals.prompt: I need to add WebSocket support to grove for real-time agent event streaming. Write a spec for this that I can give to grove agents.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a spec with deliverables, file scope with builder assignments, verification commands that test actual WebSocket behavior, acceptance criteria, and mention main.rs wiring explicitly

evals.prompt: I want 3 agents to work on different parts of a new notification system. Help me decompose this so they don't conflict.
evals.expected_output: Should assign each builder exclusive files, designate one integration builder for main.rs/mod.rs, list Do NOT modify files, and explain the sequential merge strategy

evals.prompt: Last time I dispatched a spec, the agents compiled fine but the feature didn't actually work. How do I write better verification commands?
evals.expected_output: Should explain the difference between quality gates (compilation) and behavioral verification, provide copy-paste-runnable command patterns, and reference RETRO-001/002
